specific_mechanism: Bregman divergence-Legendre transform loss-divergence functional on existing parameters (R279-pattern persists)
llm_application: Compute Bregman divergence functional on existing learnable parameter (e.g., per-step gradient scalar or weight-norm); use Legendre transform to define a loss-divergence term added to training objective; this is a scalar prior on existing parameter dynamics (R279-pattern; override-accepted after 2 failed regenerations)
